message:
fix: guard undefined string fields in NightlyReleasePulse and wire emitError category/page for cluster-access errors (#9751)

- Add normalizeMatrixPayload() in useGitHubPipelines.ts to coerce wf.name
  and wf.repo to strings when the GitHub API returns null/undefined, preventing
  'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading trim)' card_render errors on /ci-cd
- Apply normalization in both usePipelineMatrix and useUnifiedPipelineData fetchers
  so stale cached entries with name:null are also sanitized on next fetch
- Wire emitError('cluster_access', ...) in useMissions.tsx at both preflight
  failure sites so ksc_error events carry error_category and error_page dimensions
- Wire emitError('auth', ...) in api.ts before throwing UnauthenticatedError so
  'No authentication token available' events include proper GA4 dimensions
- Wire emitError('config', ...) in ApiKeyPromptModal (shared.tsx) when the
  'No AI agent available' overlay is shown, to capture error_category: config

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
